news.title:
Hotel and restaurant stocks trade mixed on LPG supply disruption concerns; Indian Hotels up 0.75%, Westlife Foodworld gains 1.52%.
Government prioritizes domestic LPG supply, impacting non-domestic sectors; FHRAI urges action to prevent financial strain in hospitality.
news.summary:
Hotel and restaurant stocks trade mixed on LPG supply disruption concerns; Indian Hotels up 0.75%, Westlife Foodworld gains 1.52%.
Government prioritizes domestic LPG supply, impacting non-domestic sectors; FHRAI urges action to prevent financial strain in hospitality.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd announces investor/analyst meet on March 11, 2026.
The meeting with Investec will be held in Mumbai at 3:00 PM in person.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd announces investor/analyst meet on March 11, 2026.
The meeting with Investec will be held in Mumbai at 3:00 PM in person.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld sets a new royalty rate post agreement with partner.
Yearly escalation details are on its website; benefits start this quarter.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld sets a new royalty rate post agreement with partner.
Yearly escalation details are on its website; benefits start this quarter.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld plans to open 20-25 new stores in Q4.
This move highlights the company's robust growth and expansion strategy.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld plans to open 20-25 new stores in Q4.
This move highlights the company's robust growth and expansion strategy.

news.title:
Westlife Food's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹975M from ₹881M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.5% from 13.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Westlife Food's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹975M from ₹881M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.5% from 13.5% YoY.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd submitted unaudited financial results for Q3 FY2025, complying with SEBI LODR Regulations.
Standalone and consolidated results were reviewed by auditors SRBC & Co LLP and approved by the board on Feb 4, 2026.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd submitted unaudited financial results for Q3 FY2025, complying with SEBI LODR Regulations.
Standalone and consolidated results were reviewed by auditors SRBC & Co LLP and approved by the board on Feb 4, 2026.

news.title:
CLSA upgrades Jubilant FoodWorks and Westlife Foodworld to 'Hold', citing valuation factors.
Jubilant fell 29%, Westlife 33% in a year; CLSA notes competitive pressures largely priced in.
news.summary:
CLSA upgrades Jubilant FoodWorks and Westlife Foodworld to 'Hold', citing valuation factors.
Jubilant fell 29%, Westlife 33% in a year; CLSA notes competitive pressures largely priced in.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd to hold board meeting on 4th Feb 2026 to approve Q3 FY25 financials.
Meeting notice complies with SEBI LODR Regulations; BSE code: 505533, NSE: WESTLIFE.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd to hold board meeting on 4th Feb 2026 to approve Q3 FY25 financials.
Meeting notice complies with SEBI LODR Regulations; BSE code: 505533, NSE: WESTLIFE.

news.title: Goldman Sachs downgrades Westlife Foodworld to Neutral with a target of ₹550.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs downgrades Westlife Foodworld to Neutral with a target of ₹550.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd announces investor/analyst meet on Feb 10, 2026, at Axis Capital's India Conference in Mumbai.
Meeting details, including presentation, will be available on the company's investor page as per Regulation 30 compliance.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd announces investor/analyst meet on Feb 10, 2026, at Axis Capital's India Conference in Mumbai.
Meeting details, including presentation, will be available on the company's investor page as per Regulation 30 compliance.

news.title:
Macquarie maintains Outperform rating on Westlife Food.
Target price reduced to Rs 600 from Rs 750.
news.summary:
Macquarie maintains Outperform rating on Westlife Food.
Target price reduced to Rs 600 from Rs 750.

news.title:
Macquarie cut targets on QSR stocks citing weak dine-in traffic and muted SSS growth.
Target prices fell for Devyani (-20%), Westlife (-20%), Sapphire (-19%), and Jubilant (-7%).
news.summary:
Macquarie cut targets on QSR stocks citing weak dine-in traffic and muted SSS growth.
Target prices fell for Devyani (-20%), Westlife (-20%), Sapphire (-19%), and Jubilant (-7%).

news.title:
Westlife Development appoints Mr. Shardul Doshi as CFO effective 15th Dec 2025.
Change in Key Managerial Personnel disclosed under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR.
news.summary:
Westlife Development appoints Mr. Shardul Doshi as CFO effective 15th Dec 2025.
Change in Key Managerial Personnel disclosed under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd Q2 FY26 earnings call highlights growth despite discretionary spend challenges, achieving 3.8% YoY revenue increase.
Digital sales contributed 75% of revenue, with strong app engagement; launched new products and expanded restaurant network to 450 locations.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd Q2 FY26 earnings call highlights growth despite discretionary spend challenges, achieving 3.8% YoY revenue increase.
Digital sales contributed 75% of revenue, with strong app engagement; launched new products and expanded restaurant network to 450 locations.

news.title: Westlife Foodworld posts ~4% yearly growth despite industry decline.
news.summary: Westlife Foodworld posts ~4% yearly growth despite industry decline.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld CFO Hrushit Shah resigns effective 4 Nov 2025, citing overseas relocation.
Shah will complete half-year duties before departure; company disclosed transition details.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld CFO Hrushit Shah resigns effective 4 Nov 2025, citing overseas relocation.
Shah will complete half-year duties before departure; company disclosed transition details.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld reports a 582M exceptional gain but a PBT loss of 158M.
The PBT loss contrasts with a 7M profit year-over-year.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld reports a 582M exceptional gain but a PBT loss of 158M.
The PBT loss contrasts with a 7M profit year-over-year.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld Q2 EBITDA drops to ₹671M from ₹760M YoY.
EBITDA margin declines to 10.5% from 12.3% YoY.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld Q2 EBITDA drops to ₹671M from ₹760M YoY.
EBITDA margin declines to 10.5% from 12.3% YoY.

news.title:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 ended Sep 30, 2025.
Results include consolidated and standalone reports reviewed by auditors, available on the company website.
news.summary:
Westlife Foodworld Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 ended Sep 30, 2025.
Results include consolidated and standalone reports reviewed by auditors, available on the company website.
